author: jeremynoesen
text: Stack cards missing border radius in panel view again

author: jeremynoesen
text:
### Checklist

* I have updated to the latest available Home Assistant version.
* I have cleared the cache of my browser.
* I have tried a different browser to see if it is related to my browser.
* I have tried reproducing the issue in [safe mode](https://www.home-assistant.io/blog/2023/11/01/release-202311/#restarting-into-safe-mode) to rule out problems with unsupported custom resources.

### Describe the issue you are experiencing

Stack cards border radius is no longer working again. [#20216](https://github.com/home-assistant/frontend/issues/20216) was fixed in 20240329.0, but broke again in 20240329.1.

### Describe the behavior you expected

Same as [#20216](https://github.com/home-assistant/frontend/issues/20216)

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Same as [#20216](https://github.com/home-assistant/frontend/issues/20216)

### What version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

core-2024.4.0b3

### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core?

core-2024.4.0b2

### In which browser are you experiencing the issue with?

Nest Hub 2 Cast 3.71.396338

### Which operating system are you using to run this browser?

Fuchsia 16.20231130.3.59

### State of relevant entities

*No response*

### Problem-relevant frontend configuration

*No response*

### Javascript errors shown in your browser console/inspector

*No response*

### Additional information

*No response*

author: piitaya
text:
Hi 👋  
Can you share the yaml of your dashboard so I can reproduce it? 🙂  
Is it only on cast? Do you experienced the same issue on desktop and mobile?

author: jeremynoesen
text: Upon further testing, it appears that this is not a homeassistant frontend issue, rather it is an issue with card mod. Stack cards display the border radius just fine, but within a mod card, the border radius does not apply. I will open an issue in the card mod repo with more information.

author: jeremynoesen
text: The card mod issue is posted [here](https://github.com/thomasloven/lovelace-card-mod/issues/369).
